prompt: People keep asking for my reading recommendations. Turn my private list into a curated feed that others can subscribe to.
Build a Bluesky client module that shows my timeline, lets me post, and handles notifications.
I make cooking videos. Build a module where I upload videos and stream them to subscribers.
I'm reading a web serial and want a local tracker for my progress with notifications when new chapters drop.
I'm a web fiction author. Build me a publishing module where I write chapters, schedule releases, and distribute them to paying subscribers.
Build an audiobook generation module that turns a chapter into narrated audio using my preferred voice and stores the result with chapter metadata.
Create an audiobook distribution module that publishes a new audio chapter to paid subscribers and sends the release notification.
Connect my WhatsApp messages to my node so I can read and reply without opening the phone app.
Build a unified inbox module that shows my Telegram hobby-group messages and WhatsApp family messages in one place while keeping the two streams visually separated.
I want one compose view that can post the same update to Bluesky, Telegram, and X.
Create a focus-hold module that pauses incoming message interruptions during a focus session and shows me a summary when the session ends.
Create a minimal offline-first email triage client with message list, detail view, reply composer, and a local outbox queue for when I reconnect.
Build a local-first peer-to-peer messenger that works over the LAN without internet or centralized servers.
Create an email archive module that stores messages locally, supports full-text search, threading, templates, and export.
Build a system tray mail watcher module that monitors multiple IMAP inboxes and shows unread counts with native notifications.
Create a local voice-note recorder with microphone selection, start-stop controls, waveform preview, and simple save or attach actions.
Build a lightweight IRC client with channel list, message timeline, compose input, notifications, and connection controls.
Create an onboarding walkthrough that teaches users how to use an email client through highlighted steps and tooltips.
Build a local announcement reader that turns queued text sources into spoken audio with scheduling and source priority.
Create a subtitle and timed-text track editor for local video files with waveform or timeline preview and export.
Generate a local-first artist profile hub with biography, timeline, discography, gallery, and a simple contact handoff.
Build a mailing-list manager for a small self-publishing operation that tracks contacts, shipments, labels, digital subscribers, and follow-ups.
Create a local contact capture tool for storing, searching, tagging, and exporting professional contacts from cards, signatures, or manual entry.
Build a unified inbox shell where multiple message sources appear in one view with clear per-source separation and unread counts.
Create a cross-post composer with destination toggles, per-network character warnings, attachment preview, and send status.
Build a focus-hold summary card that groups held messages by source, sender, and urgency for review when a session ends.
Create an email thread view with collapsed replies, attachments, labels, and quick reply actions.
Build a subtitle segment editor with start time, end time, line text, and next or previous navigation.
